Privacy-First CAPTCHA
Home Privacy Terms

Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2024

Our Privacy Commitment

At VaultGuard™, privacy is not just a feature—it's our foundation. We believe that security verification should never come at the cost of user privacy. Our CAPTCHA solution is designed from the ground up to protect both your website and your users' personal information.

Zero Tracking Guarantee

VaultGuard™ CAPTCHA does not track, fingerprint, or profile users in any way. We collect zero personal data. Period.

Data We Collect

Transparency is core to our mission. Here's exactly what data VaultGuard™ CAPTCHA handles during the verification process:

Data Type Collected Purpose Retention
Challenge Answers Never N/A N/A
IP Addresses Never N/A N/A
Browser Fingerprint Never N/A N/A
Cookies Never N/A N/A
Temporary Challenge Data Yes Verification only Expires in 5 min

Note: The temporary challenge data (question and hashed answer) exists only in your browser's memory and is automatically deleted after the challenge expires or is completed. This data is never transmitted to our servers.

How VaultGuard™ Protects Your Privacy

  • Client-Side Processing: All CAPTCHA generation and verification happens in the user's browser. No data is sent to external servers.
  • No Cookies: We don't set, read, or use cookies of any kind. No tracking cookies, no session cookies, no analytics cookies.
  • No Fingerprinting: We don't collect browser fingerprints, canvas fingerprints, or any other identifying information.
  • No Third-Party Requests: Our library makes zero external network requests. Everything is self-contained.
  • Ephemeral Data: Challenge data exists only temporarily in memory and is automatically cleaned up.
  • Open Source: Our code is fully auditable. You can verify our privacy claims by reviewing the source code.

VaultGuard™ vs. Traditional CAPTCHAs

Feature VaultGuard™ Traditional CAPTCHAs
User Tracking None Extensive
Cookies None Required
External Servers None Required
Data Collection Zero Extensive
GDPR Compliance Inherent Complex
Accessibility High Varies

GDPR & Privacy Law Compliance

Because VaultGuard™ collects zero personal data, compliance with privacy regulations like GDPR, CCPA, and others is significantly simplified:

  • No consent required: We don't process personal data, so cookie consent banners are not needed for our CAPTCHA.
  • No data processing agreements: Since no data leaves the user's browser, there's no data processing to regulate.
  • No data breach risk: With zero data collection, there's nothing to breach.
  • No user rights requests: No data means no data to access, delete, or port.

Contact Us

Have Privacy Questions?

We're committed to transparency. If you have any questions about our privacy practices or how VaultGuard™ protects user data, please reach out.

privacy@vaultguard-captcha.dev
